name: Figma
description: Collaborative interface design tool in the browser. The standard for UI/UX design and prototyping.

name: Sketch
description: Vector design tool for macOS focused on UI/UX. Symbols, shared libraries, and a large plugin ecosystem.

name: Adobe XD
description: Adobe's UI/UX design and prototyping tool. Repeat grids, auto-animate, and Creative Cloud integration.

name: Penpot
description: Open-source design and prototyping platform. Browser-based, SVG-native, and self-hostable alternative to Figma.

name: Framer
description: Design tool that publishes directly to production websites. Component-based, responsive layouts, and CMS built in.

name: Lunacy
description: Free design tool by Icons8 with built-in assets, AI-powered features, and Sketch file compatibility.

name: InVision
description: Digital product design platform for prototyping, collaboration, and design system management.

name: Excalidraw
description: Virtual whiteboard for hand-drawn style diagrams. Real-time collaboration, simple, and works entirely in the browser.

name: Mermaid
description: Generate diagrams and charts from text definitions. Flowcharts, sequence diagrams, Gantt charts, and more in Markdown.

name: draw.io
description: Free diagramming tool for flowcharts, network diagrams, UML, and more. Works offline and integrates with cloud storage.

name: Lucidchart
description: Cloud-based diagramming tool for flowcharts, org charts, wireframes, and technical diagrams. Real-time collaboration.

name: Miro
description: Online collaborative whiteboard for teams. Brainstorming, sticky notes, mind maps, and hundreds of templates.

name: tldraw
description: Infinite canvas for drawing and diagramming. Open-source, embeddable SDK, and a clean minimal interface.

name: PlantUML
description: Generate UML diagrams from plain text. Supports sequence, class, activity, component, and many other diagram types.

name: FigJam
description: Online whiteboard by Figma for brainstorming, diagramming, and team workshops. Stamps, stickers, and voting.

name: Google Fonts
description: Free, open-source font library with over 1,500 families. CDN hosting, variable fonts, and easy web embedding.

name: Inter
description: Free, open-source typeface designed for computer screens. Variable font with extensive OpenType features.

name: JetBrains Mono
description: Free monospaced font designed for developers. Increased letter height, ligatures, and optimized for code reading.

name: Nerd Fonts
description: Patches developer-targeted fonts with icon glyphs from Font Awesome, Devicons, and more. Essential for terminal setups.

name: Font Awesome
description: Icon toolkit with thousands of scalable vector icons. CSS classes, SVG framework, and pro icon sets for web projects.

name: Fontshare
description: Free fonts service by Indian Type Foundry. Curated, high-quality typefaces for personal and commercial use.

name: Fira Code
description: Monospaced font with programming ligatures. Merges multi-character sequences into readable symbols for code.

name: Principle
description: Animation and interaction design tool for macOS. Create animated UI prototypes with timeline-based transitions.

name: ProtoPie
description: Advanced prototyping tool for multi-device interactions. Sensor input, conditional logic, and no-code prototypes.

name: Zeplin
description: Design handoff and collaboration tool. Generates specs, assets, and code snippets from Figma and Sketch files.

name: Whimsical
description: Unified workspace for flowcharts, wireframes, mind maps, and docs. Fast, structured, and visually clean.

name: Creately
description: Visual collaboration platform with smart diagramming. Flowcharts, database diagrams, and visual project management.

name: D2
description: Modern declarative diagramming language that turns text to diagrams. Supports themes, SQL tables, and sequence diagrams.

name: FontForge
description: Free, open-source font editor. Create, edit, and convert fonts in OpenType, TrueType, and many other formats.

name: FontBase
description: Font manager for designers. Preview, organize, and activate fonts across your system without installing them.
